stemHtml: What is the ICAO definition for stopway?

options.a: A defined rectangular area on the ground at the end of take-off run available prepared to reduce the risk of damage to aircraft running off a runway.
options.b: A defined rectangular area on the ground or water established to permit aircraft to make a portion of its initial climb to a specific height.
options.c: A defined rectangular area on the ground or water established to protect aircraft during take-off or landing operations.
options.d: A defined rectangular area on the ground at the end of take-off run available prepared as a suitable area in which an aircraft can be stopped in the case of an abandoned take-off.
